text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Trainer... Could I rest here for a bit?
choice_data_list: Are you feeling under the weather?
Are you feeling under the weather?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Not exactly... A friend of mine asked me to help
out with housework that had piled up.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I've been cleaning and doing laundry since this
morning...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It was loads of fun, but there was way more to do
than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I guess I got a little too carried away...
